name: IS 1893 + IS 875 + IS 13920 — Seismic & Loads Bundle
name_hi: आईएस 1893 + आईएस 875 + आईएस 13920 — भूकम्पीय एवं भार बंडल

codes_in_bundle.title: Criteria for Earthquake Resistant Design of Structures — Part 1: General Provisions & Buildings
Code of Practice for Design Loads — Part 1 Dead Loads
Ductile Detailing of RCC Subjected to Seismic Forces

description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that check structural-design documents and BOQs against the full Indian seismic + loads code bundle. Covers seismic zone declaration (Zones II-V), response-reduction factor, importance factor, soil type, all five load categories (DL/IL/WL/SL/special), and ductile-detailing for RCC frames where applicable.
description_hi: संरचनात्मक डिज़ाइन एवं बीओक्यू की भारतीय भूकम्पीय + भार कोड बंडल के अनुसार जाँच।
